sentences.target: Je brise le chocolat pour le partager.
sentences.reading: /ʒə bʁiz lə ʃɔkɔla puʁ lə paʁtaʒe/

translations.fr: Je brise le chocolat pour le partager.
translations.ipa: /ʒə bʁiz lə ʃɔkɔla puʁ lə paʁtaʒe/
translations.en: I break the chocolate to share it.
translations.de: Ich breche die Schokolade, um sie zu teilen.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把巧克力掰开来分享。
translations.ru: Я ломаю шоколад, чтобы поделиться им.
translations.pt: Eu quebro o chocolate para compartilhá-lo.
translations.he: אני שובר את השוקולד כדי לחלוק אותו.
translations.vi: Tôi bẻ thanh sô cô la để chia.
translations.nl: Ik breek de chocolade om te delen.
translations.uk: Я ламаю шоколад, щоб поділитися ним.
translations.hi: मैं चॉकलेट तोड़ता हूँ ताकि उसे बाँट सकूँ.
translations.pl: Łamię czekoladę, żeby się nią podzielić.
translations.el: Σπάω τη σοκολάτα για να τη μοιραστώ.
translations.nb: Jeg bryter opp sjokoladen for å dele den.
translations.sv: Jag bryter chokladen för att dela den.
translations.ro: Rup ciocolata ca să o împart.
translations.cs: Lámu čokoládu, abych se o ní podělil.
translations.da: Jeg brækker chokoladen for at dele den.
translations.fi: Katkon suklaalevyn, jotta voin jakaa sen.
translations.ja: チョコレートを割って分けます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the sentence.
Main verb in the present indicative (1st person singular) meaning ‘to break’.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the direct object noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘brise’.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a purpose infinitival clause.
Clitic direct object pronoun (3rd person masculine singular) referring back to ‘le chocolat’.
Infinitive verb heading the purpose clause; takes the clitic ‘le’ as its object.

sentences.target: Tu brises le silence avec ta musique.
sentences.reading: /ty bʁiz lə silɑ̃s avɛk ta myzik/

translations.fr: Tu brises le silence avec ta musique.
translations.ipa: /ty bʁiz lə silɑ̃s avɛk ta myzik/
translations.en: You break the silence with your music.
translations.es: Rompes el silencio con tu música.
translations.de: Du brichst die Stille mit deiner Musik.
translations.it: Rompi il silenzio con la tua musica.
translations.zh-Hans: 你用你的音乐打破沉默。
translations.yue: 你用你嘅音樂打破沉默。
translations.pt: Você quebra o silêncio com sua música.
translations.he: אתה שובר את השתיקה עם המוזיקה שלך.
translations.vi: Bạn phá vỡ sự im lặng bằng âm nhạc của mình.
translations.nl: Je doorbreekt de stilte met je muziek.
translations.hi: तुम अपने संगीत से सन्नाटे को तोड़ते हो.
translations.el: Σπας τη σιωπή με τη μουσική σου.
translations.nb: Du bryter stillheten med musikken din.
translations.sv: Du bryter tystnaden med din musik.
translations.da: Du bryder stilheden med din musik.
translations.ja: あなたの音楽で沈黙を破ります。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the sentence.
Main verb in the present indicative (2nd person singular).
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the object noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘brises’.
Preposition introducing a means/instrument prepositional phrase.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, feminine singular; agrees with ‘musique’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘avec’.

sentences.target: On brise la glace avec un jeu.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ bʁiz la glas avɛk œ̃ ʒø/

translations.fr: On brise la glace avec un jeu.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ bʁiz la glas avɛk œ̃ ʒø/
translations.en: We break the ice with a game.
translations.es: Rompemos el hielo con un juego.
translations.de: Wir brechen das Eis mit einem Spiel.
translations.it: Rompiamo il ghiaccio con un gioco.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们用游戏来打破僵局。
translations.yue: 我哋用遊戲嚟打破僵局。
translations.ru: Мы разряжаем обстановку с помощью игры.
translations.pt: Quebramos o gelo com um jogo.
translations.he: אנחנו שוברים את הקרח עם משחק.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi phá băng bằng một trò chơi.
translations.nl: We breken het ijs met een spel.
translations.hi: हम एक खेल से झिझक तोड़ते हैं.
translations.el: Σπάμε τον πάγο με ένα παιχνίδι.
translations.nb: Vi bryter isen med et spill.
translations.id: Kami mencairkan suasana dengan sebuah permainan.
translations.sv: Vi bryter isen med ett spel.
translations.da: Vi bryder isen med et spil.
translations.ja: ゲームで場の緊張をほぐします。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/personal pronoun, 3rd person singular; generic subject (‘one’/informal ‘we’).
Main verb in the present indicative (3rd person singular).
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing the object noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘brise’. Part of the idiom ‘briser la glace’.
Preposition introducing a means/instrument phrase.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introducing ‘jeu’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of ‘avec’.

sentences.target: Ils brisent la bouteille par accident.

translations.fr: Ils brisent la bouteille par accident.
translations.en: They break the bottle by accident.
translations.de: Sie zerbrechen die Flasche aus Versehen.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们不小心打碎了瓶子。
translations.yue: 佢哋唔小心打爛咗個樽。
translations.pt: Eles quebram a garrafa sem querer.
translations.vi: Họ vô tình làm vỡ chai.
translations.ar: هم يكسرون الزجاجة عن طريق الخطأ.
translations.nl: Ze breken per ongeluk de fles.
translations.hi: वे गलती से बोतल तोड़ देते हैं.
translations.nb: De knuser flasken ved et uhell.
translations.da: De smadrer flasken ved et uheld.
translations.ja: 彼らはうっかり瓶を割ります。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural; subject of the sentence.
Main verb in the present indicative (3rd person plural).
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing the object noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘brisent’.
Preposition introducing a manner/cause phrase.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of ‘par’ in the set phrase ‘par accident’ (unintentionally).
